titleStmt.title: SII 34.313: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 313. Tiruvaranguḷam, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the wall of the second gōpura of the Haratīrthēśvara temple, left of entrance.

summary.p: Vijayanagara, •••s/o Mallikārjunarāya, Śaka 1421, Siddhārti, Vṛiśchika, sudi 11, Saturday, Rēvati = A.D. 1498, November 24, Saturday (Cyclic year should be Kālayukta the previous year).

This records the sale of three villages, Pālaikkuḍi, Kaḷaṅguḍi, and Kiḷinallūr in Kiḷippayiṟṟūr-nāḍu in Rājarāja-vaḷanāḍu to the temple of Tiruvaraṅguḷam by the ūravar of those villages along with the araiyas of Valla-nāḍu who had the pāḍikāval rights in them and those who were leaseholders of land in the same village. The sale was made to pay off the heavy kaḍamai dues demanded on these villages by Svāmi Narasā-Nāyakkar. As the villagers could not pay the tax they had to sell the villages. The araiyars of Valla-nāḍu who are the mortgagees of some land in those villages were also a party to this transaction. [See No. 272 which is related to this record].

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrīman Irācāti I para
tēvamakā Irāyar mal Irāyar kumārar piṟutivi
irācciyam paṇṇiyaru ṉṟa cakāttam 1000 4 100 2 10 1n
mēṟcellā niṉṟa cittārtti varuṣattu viṟucciya nāyaṟṟu
pūṟuvapakṣattu Ekā� ṉivāramum peṟṟa rēvati
nāḷ Irāca Irāca vaḷanāṭṭu valla nāṭṭu Uṭaiyār
tiruvarankuḷa ti caṇḍeśvara
tēvaṟku Iṉṉāṭṭu kiḷippayiṟṟūr nāṭṭup
pālaikkuṭi kaḷaṅkuṭi kiḷinallūr Inta Ūravar
kaḷum Immūṉṟu Ūṟkum pāṭikāval Uṭaiyōm
Āṉavarkaḷum Ivvūr nilaṅkaḷil koṇṭum Oṟṟi piṭittum
Uṭaiōm Āṉa valla nāṭṭu Araiyarkaḷum Ōm kalveṭṭi
kuṭuttapaṭi cuvāmi naracānāyakkar kaṭamaikku Eṅkaḷukku
Inta mūṉṟu Ūṟkum piṟivu vanta kaṭamaip paṇṭārattukku Eṅ
kaḷukku Iṟai Āṟṟātapaṭiyālē Iṟaiyē vilaiyāka Iṉṉāya
ṉāṟku viṟṟut tirunāmattukkāṇiyāka kallilum cempilum
veṭṭikkuṭutta pālaikkuṭi kaḷaṅkuṭi kiḷinallūrkum
perunāṉku Ellaikku kīḻnōkkiya kiṇaṟum
mēlnōkkiya maramum nattamum nattappāḻum kuḷamum vayalu
kuḷapparappum kuḷavāttalaiyum puṉcey mum maṟṟum Ep
pēṟpaṭṭaṉavum muṉṉāḷ Uḷḷūr nayiṉār tēvatāṉa kuṭi
nīṅkal Ākat tirunāmattukkāṇi Āka tāṉ vēṇṭiya
kuṭimuṭṭic cantiṟa Ātittavaṟakkum cella Āṇṭu
Aṉupavittum pōta Inta mūṉṟu Ūrum Iṉṉāyiṉār
tiruccūlattāpaṉamum paṇṇik kallilum cempilum
veṭṭikkuṭuttōm pālaikkuṭi kaḷaṅkuṭi kiḷinallū
kaḷum Inta mūṉṟu Ūṟkup pāṭikāval Uṭai
Ūrkaḷil nilattil vilaikoṇṭum Oṟṟi
vaittum m Āṉa valla nāṭu Araiyarkaḷum
Digital edition of SII 34.313 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
